publishedAbstract: When attempting to create a cephfs subvolume using: ~~~ ceph fs subvolume create cephfs example--group_name mysubvolgrp ~~~ The result is the following error: ~~~ Error EINVAL: invalid value specified for ceph.dir.subvolume ~~~
publishedTitle: Creating cephfs subvolumes reports: Error EINVAL: invalid value specified for ceph.dir.subvolume
